info.line: Install a merge of Anomaly Expedition 2.3 and G.A.M.M.A.
Include Expedition 2.3 update with better and weather. Improvements include DoF, Fog effects, Wind effects, Particles
Include custom integration of SS Rain Puddles and Beefs NVG custom patch, both exclusives of this profile. The Expedition modpack officially does not support Beefs NVG and SS rain puddles
All Expeditions merge compoments are deployed as different mods and selectable
You can pick and choose how you want to change G.A.M.M.A. with the Expedition experience, by enabling/disabling each mod

installCompletionMessage.line: 1. MEET THE REQUIREMENTS
This profile is enhanced for DX 11
It's recommended to play at 2K resolution and if you can, use DSR. This will greatly increase image quality with these shaders
This EXT profile has installed in Mod Organizer 2 profiles that can be selected to play GAMMA EXP Edition in a certain way
2. LAUNCHING THE GAME FOR THE FIRST TIME
FOLLOW these steps when running any of these profile for the first time after install
1. When you select any profile, run Apply Settings desktop shortcut to install in Anomaly the Reshade for that profile
2. Launch the game with Anomaly (DX11 or DX11 AVX) executables in MO and change your preferences in game settings menu
3. After when you exit the game, run Save Settings desktop shortcut to keep the settings at step 2
4. Whenever you come back to play this profile, run again Apply Settings to reapply in Anomaly the Reshade and all settings saved at step 3
3. RESHADE AND GAME SETTINGS
This profile comes with its own reshade
4. PROFILE CUSTOMIZATION
Remember. All Expeditions compoments are deployed as separate mods. Search them in MO with GAMMA EXP Edition keyword
You can pick and choose how you want to change G.A.M.M.A. with the Expedition experience, by enabling/disabling each mod
However, you cannot disable these mods when using the base profile (not [ ATMOSPHERICS ])
- GAMMA EXP Edition - Shaders: adds the Expedition shaders
- GAMMA EXP Edition - Weather [ EXP ]:  adds the Expedition weathers
- GAMMA EXP Edition - VFX [ EXP ]:  adds the Expedition custom Cinematic VFX
- GAMMA EXP Edition - GAMMA Patch: Patch to the Expedition files for GAMMA compatibility
The Expedition's experience customization
Some of these mods come already enabled in the base profile but are still optional. The advice is to start like this and change at your will if things are not to your liking
- `GAMMA EXP Edition - UI`                 Change the UI and interface sounds to be like the one in Expedition. The HUD however will be the same as in G.A.M.M.A.
- `GAMMA EXP Edition - HUD`                Adds the Expedition HUD FOV
Several HUD options are included to customize further the HUD
- `GAMMA EXP Edition - Sounds`             Adds all Expedition sounds in one mod
Since all optional EXP mods comes with their EXP sounds, use this if you want the Exp sounds across the board even when those mods are disabled
This also adds the Weapons sounds even though no weapon from Expedition can be merged as yet. Enable this if you want to hear the weapons sound from EXP
Beware, G.A.M.M.A. combat ai improvements using sound comments might be nullified by enabling this mod. Not confirmed though
G.A.M.M.A. now includes DARK SIGNAL audio packs which are BETTER that the Expedition sounds, disable Sounds if you want the better experience
- `GAMMA EXP Edition - Music`              Adds the Expedition soundtrack
- `GAMMA EXP Edition - Adds GAMMA's music` Just as it says, if you enable this you'll get both soundtracks playing in the game
- `GAMMA EXP Edition - Beef's NVG Patch    Allow to use GAMMA Beef's NVGs mod, you must enable both mod and patch
If you enable/disable this you must delete the shader cache or run apply_settings to see the changes applied in game

- `GAMMA EXP Edition - HD Models [ EXP ]`                Contains the assets for the HD Models for the NPC from the Gunslinger NPC modpack. This on his own does nothing, requires the Config mod to fully enable
- `GAMMA EXP Edition - HD Models [ Toggle, enables HD models in the game ]s`        Enable the HD Models in the game. Requires new game to have the HD models spawn in the world
5. PROFILE KITS
This EXT profile has installed in Mod Organizer the base profile called `GAMMA EXP Edition` plus 1 more profile kit
A kit is a prefab variation of the base profile modlist for easy swap between different configuration of optional mods as explained in PROFILE CUSTOMIZATION
All kits use the their own settings, use Apply Settings whenever you switch to them and Save Settings if you change your preferences in the game settings menu
- `GAMMA EXP Edition`                                      The base profile include everything from the Expedition merge
- `GAMMA EXP Edition - HD Models`                          Like the base profile but with Gunslinger HD Models
- `GAMMA EXP Edition - HD Models [ ATMOSPHERICS ]`         Like the HD Models profile but with Atmospherics weather and Shaders insteaad of the Expedition ones
6. CREDITS
Check the Expedition ModDb page's Credits section for details about all thirty party mods included
https://www.moddb.com/mods/stalker-anomaly/addons/expedition-graphical-overhaul-addon-for-anomaly-151
Screenspace Shaders
https://www.moddb.com/mods/stalker-anomaly/addons/screen-space-shaders
